author: jjor3
name: AR Self-Gen GPTQ + AR Temp Scale + Output-Side N-gram Tilt (draft)
blurb: Draft candidate forked from the 2026-03-25 top legal record. Replaces the previous input-side TRIGRAM hash (Zipf chi² collision risk) with a Nacrith-style output-side interpolated 1..K-gram tilt with lambda_k backoff, applied as a closed-form NLL correction during val eval. Keeps AR self-gen GPTQ and AR self-gen eval-temperature search. Causal-compliant (C1-C4). Metrics pending rerun on 8xH100 SXM.
calibration: AR self-generated GPTQ calibration + AR self-generated eval-temperature calibration
technique_summary: AR self-gen GPTQ + AR self-gen eval-temperature search + output-side Nacrith interpolated n-gram tilt (orders 1..K, lambda_k backoff, closed-form NLL correction during eval)

novelties.name: ar_eval_temp_search
novelties.description: Self-generated autoregressive token grid search over per-eval temperature.
novelties.expected_delta_nats: near-zero (model is calibrated to its own samples)

novelties.name: output_side_ngram_tilt
novelties.description: Interpolated 1..K-gram count predictor (Nacrith eq. 6-7) producing one hint h_t per scored val position. Closed-form tilt p'(a) = p(a) * exp(beta * 1[a==h_t]) / Z_t applied to model NLL when n-gram confidence p_hat >= NGRAM_TILT_THRESHOLD.

removed_from_prior_draft: BigramHashEmbedding.trigram_hash (input-side hash trigram blending) — chi² 78k Zipf collision risk per the parent draft's own analysis
